availabilityModel.regularSeason: Per-game active rosters sampled from sourced Basketball Reference regular-season games played; active roles scale from per-active-game season load.
availabilityModel.postseason: Actual playoff teams use sourced Basketball Reference playoff games, minutes, and totals for availability and role. Non-playoff teams use a generic tightened playoff rotation from regular-season availability.
availabilityModel.shootingSkill: Player shot-making remains based on larger regular-season samples to avoid overfitting small playoff shooting percentages.
